pkgmetadata.longdescription: tccbox is a Python package exposing three helpers (tcc_bin_path, tcc_lib_dir, tcc_include_dir) used by sasmodels/sasview to locate a tiny C compiler for runtime JIT compilation of scattering kernels. Upstream ships a wheel bundling a prebuilt TCC; this ebuild is a source-based shim whose helpers return paths into the system dev-lang/tcc install instead.
